rulings.Case Title: HURLEY RICHARDSON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) S REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS B et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 28, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant STM Automotive, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Plaintiff¿s deposition testimony and declaration and the declaration of Mr. Ay create a triable issue whether plaintiff was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials (Bendix brakes) attributable to defendant. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: FLOYD CZARNICK et al VS. ALLIED PACKING et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 28, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Metalclad Insulation Corp.¿s motion for summary judgment is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. =(220/HEK)
